issue.title: Game mode party map marker no longer auto-syncs to the narrated location

coreClaim: Game map party position sync consumes structured location changes, not only explicit map_update tags.

assignment.evidence: gh issue edit 2139 --repo Pasta-Devs/Marinara-Engine --add-assignee '@me' returned the issue URL before implementation.

preflight.details: Exact PR search for 2139 returned no matches; no local issue-2139 branch or worktree existed before this worktree.

prBoundary.inScope: Restore location-driven game map party marker sync and discovery parity.
prBoundary.outOfScope: No game map UI redesign, no unrelated world-state behavior changes.

reproduction.method: Focused scratch Vitest repro imported the missing location-sync export and exercised node, grid, meta map selection, and no-match behavior.
evidence: Before fix: the structured-location repro failed because syncGameMapMetaPartyPosition was absent from the refactor map-position service.

focusedProof: pnpm exec vitest run --config scratch/issue-2139-vitest.config.ts passed with 5 tests after the fix.
pnpm exec vitest run --config scratch/issue-2139-vitest.config.ts --reporter=json --outputFile=scratch/issue-2139-vitest-after.json passed and wrote a JSON report.
edgeCases: Node maps: structured location text moves partyPosition to an existing node and marks it discovered.
Grid maps: structured location text moves partyPosition to a matching cell and marks it discovered.
Multiple maps: metadata sync selects the map containing the reported location and updates activeGameMapId.
No-match location: metadata stays on the current active map and does not invent a new location.
Location detection: node and grid map containment both return true for matching labels and false for unrelated labels.
verification.visualProof: Backend/logic bug with no meaningful UI state; machine proof is the focused scratch Vitest output and scratch/issue-2139-vitest-after.json.

riskClaimMatrix.coreClaim: Location-driven map sync restores legacy parity for existing game maps without changing explicit map_update behavior.
positiveRowsTested: location on a non-active stored map
negativeRowsTested: unmatched location does not create a node
unmatched location does not switch active map

groundTruthFacts.fact: Refactor had parse/apply map_update command support but no exported location-driven sync functions before this change.
groundTruthFacts.method: harness-proven by the focused scratch Vitest repro and derived from rg across src and src-tauri.

finalDoneGate.notes: Focused proof, typecheck, architecture check, full pnpm check, proof gate, Bunny pass, and draft PR creation completed. CI and CodeRabbit are pending.
